task_completion.description: Navigate to the target URL to measure initial letterboxed dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser is open and the URL bar shows 'https://check.torproject.org/'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the advanced preferences page in Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser URL bar shows 'about:config' and the advanced preferences warning or search page is visible.
The 'about:config' page shows 'privacy.resistFingerprinting.letterboxing' in the search field, and its value is set to 'false'.

task_completion.description: Revisit the target URL to measure unconstrained dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser is navigated back to 'https://check.torproject.org/' after the preference change (often visually distinct by the absence of gray letterboxing margins around the webpage content).

task_completion.description: Create the required audit text file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or vim) or terminal command shows the creation or editing of a file named '/home/ga/Documents/letterboxing_audit.txt'.

task_completion.description: Record the measured dimensions using the exact required format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the text file are visible and include the exact labels: 'Letterboxed Width:', 'Letterboxed Height:', 'Unconstrained Width:', and 'Unconstrained Height:', each followed by a numeric value.

integrity.description: The agent used the Tor Browser GUI to change the preference.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the 'about:config' interface in Tor Browser, rather than using terminal commands to silently edit the prefs.js file.

integrity.description: The agent actually measured the viewport dimensions rather than guessing or hardcoding values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening Web Developer Tools, using the web console (e.g., typing window.innerWidth/innerHeight), or using an inspector tool to find the actual dimensions.

integrity.description: The recorded dimensions reflect a genuine change in the browser's viewport state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric values recorded for 'Unconstrained' dimensions differ from the 'Letterboxed' dimensions, reflecting the removal of the forced step-sizing margins.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target preference to disable: 'privacy.resistFingerprinting.letterboxing'. Expected output file path: '/home/ga/Documents/letterboxing_audit.txt'. The text file MUST contain these exact four labels to be correct: 'Letterboxed Width:', 'Letterboxed Height:', 'Unconstrained Width:', and 'Unconstrained Height:'.
